summary: Frontend-only testing of the StraitsSpace iteration (Landing at /, floating chat widget, AI in Bahasa Indonesia, dashboards moved to /admin and /admin/console). 6 of 7 requested behaviors verified end-to-end. One HIGH priority UX bug found: the Emergent platform badge at bottom-right intercepts pointer events for the floating chat launcher (real-mouse click blocked; JS-click worked). One observation around the simulator inject button on /admin (lead count did not increase). All other flows pass — Bahasa Indonesia hero copy, BI Pak Budi reply, live DeepSeek product cards, checkout/place-order/wallet deduction, topup, /admin nav with Antrian Rep / Konsol Admin / Lihat Situs links, /admin/console tabs (products, orders, logs).

ui_bugs.issue: Floating launcher button at bottom-6 right-6 is overlapped by the platform-injected '#emergent-badge' (Made with Emergent) which intercepts pointer events. Playwright's real mouse click on data-testid='chat-launcher' times out with 'emergent-badge intercepts pointer events'. The widget opens via JS .click() but real end-users in the deployed preview will face the same overlap. The badge sits at the bottom-right corner where the launcher is also anchored.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Reposition launcher away from the badge (e.g. bottom-24 right-6, or bottom-6 right-24) OR detect the badge and shift launcher above it. Increasing z-index alone may not help because the badge uses pointer-events on a stacking context above the page; physical separation is the reliable fix.

ui_bugs.issue: On first open of the widget the wallet-balance button briefly renders '$0.00' before GET /wallet returns and updates it to the real balance. Causes a flash of incorrect data.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Show a skeleton or '…' until wallet is loaded; gate the button text on wallet !== null.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking '[data-testid=sim-high_value]' did not change the visible lead-card count (7 before, 7 after). Either the inject backend call is failing, the new lead is ranked off-screen / replaces an existing one, or list is capped. Could not confirm a new card appeared. (Did not see any console error; suggests silent no-op visually.)
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Verify POST to /api/simulator/inject returns 200 and re-fetches /api/leads; ensure new lead appears in the ranked list (or surface a toast confirming inject).

issues: React console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' on every dialog (a11y). Add a <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby.

action_items: HIGH: Move the chat-launcher off the exact bottom-right corner so the Emergent platform badge does not intercept clicks (e.g. fixed bottom-24 right-6, or right-24 bottom-6).
MEDIUM: Verify sim-high_value actually adds a lead to the visible queue on /admin (toast + new card).
LOW: Hide wallet $0.00 flash before /api/wallet resolves.
LOW: Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to all DialogContent components (a11y).
critical_code_review_comments: ChatWidget.jsx uses z-[60] for the launcher, but the platform badge (#emergent-badge) sits above it in stacking + pointer-event terms. Trying to outrun a host-page injected element by z-index is fragile; physical offset is correct fix.
Initial wallet rendering shows $0.00 because wallet state defaults to null and the button reads `wallet?.balance ?? 0`. Acceptable but causes a visible flicker.
Landing.jsx has its own top header that duplicates branding logic also present in AdminLayout — minor DRY concern but acceptable for a marketing page.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (6/7 critical flows verified; chat-launcher requires JS-click workaround due to badge overlap)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing customer session and live DeepSeek-driven chat. Order placed for product id d4fe9d5a-...  (~$39 deducted). Wallet topped up by $100 once.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use JS click (page.evaluate("document.querySelector('[data-testid=\"chat-launcher\"]').click()")) to open the widget while the badge overlap is unfixed. After fix, validate chat-launcher accepts a normal Playwright .click() without force/JS. Live DeepSeek calls take 4–10s; allow >=12s wait_for_selector on product cards. Pak Budi replies arrive in Bahasa Indonesia as expected.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause of chat-launcher click failure: the host preview environment injects '<a id="emergent-badge">' fixed at the bottom-right corner. It sits visually and in the hit-test stack above the floating chat button (whose anchor is bottom-6 right-6, the exact same corner). Playwright correctly reports 'emergent-badge intercepts pointer events'. Real users will experience partial blockage of the launcher. Reproduction: open https://lead-priority-hub-2.preview.emergentagent.com/ at desktop viewport; attempt to click the blue floating MessageCircle button at the bottom-right; the badge takes the click instead. Mitigation: physically separate launcher from corner (bottom-24, or right-24).
